headline: Will Constellation Brands’ (STZ) New McDonald’s CMO Director Reframe Its Consumer Brand Playbook?
summary: Constellation Brands recently elected Morgan Flatley, Executive Vice President, Global Chief Marketing Officer and New Business Ventures at McDonald’s, to its Board of Directors as an independent member, restoring the Board to twelve seats as part of an ongoing refresh following former CEO Bill Newlands’ retirement. Flatley’s track record leading high-impact global marketing and innovation at McDonald’s and previously at PepsiCo brings deep consumer brand-building expertise directly relevant...

headline: A Look At Constellation Brands (STZ) Valuation After Adding McDonald’s Executive E. Morgan Flatley To Its Board
summary: Constellation Brands (STZ) has expanded its Board of Directors, adding McDonald’s executive E. Morgan Flatley effective May 20, 2026. The move is tied to its recent leadership transition and ongoing board refreshment efforts. See our latest analysis for Constellation Brands. At a share price of $149.50, Constellation Brands has seen its 7 day share price return rise 5.02%, while the 1 year total shareholder return is down 16.74% and the 5 year total shareholder return is down 31.84%. This...
